about.title: About EL BOTI CLIM
about.imageAlt: EL BOTI CLIM HVAC technicians standing below a completed air conditioning installation
about.description: EL BOTI CLIM SARL AU delivers dependable HVAC solutions with a strong focus on installation quality, system performance, and responsive service for residential and commercial clients in Tangier.
about.secondaryText: Our work combines technical discipline with practical field experience, which means clients get systems that are correctly sized, carefully installed, and easier to maintain over time.
about.panelText: Installation quality, maintenance discipline, and long-term system reliability.
about.mediaText: Residential and commercial HVAC work delivered with clean finishing, disciplined execution, and responsive after-service support.
highlights: Certified HVAC technicians with 10+ years experience
Professional installation of split, central & VRF systems
Preventive maintenance contracts for homes & businesses
Serving Tangier, Tetouan, and northern Morocco

services.title: Execution-first HVAC capabilities for every environment.
services.description: From new installations to urgent intervention, we cover the core HVAC services clients need with clean, dependable execution.
services.secondaryText: Every service is structured around site reality: equipment fit, airflow balance, neat routing, maintenance readiness, and reliable support after handover.

featured.title: Commercial HVAC
featured.description: End-to-end commercial climate systems including design advisory, installation, commissioning, and ongoing service for offices, retail, and multi-zone facilities.
points: System planning adapted to occupancy, layout, and usage rhythm.
Clean installation workflow with organized routing and commissioning.
Service continuity through maintenance and rapid troubleshooting.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose EL BOTI CLIM?
whyChoose.description: Execution quality, responsive support, and system outcomes built for long-term performance.
whyChoose.introTitle: A field team built for clean delivery, fast intervention, and durable system performance.
whyChoose.secondaryText: We do not just install equipment. We plan airflow, respect site conditions, finish cleanly, and stay available when clients need maintenance, diagnostics, or urgent intervention.

whyChoose.highlightText: Clear recommendations, disciplined installation, and reliable follow-up once the system is operating on site.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Clear and practical answers to the questions clients ask before installation, service, and long-term support.

items.question: Do you provide maintenance services?
items.answer: Yes, we offer scheduled and on-demand maintenance plans for all system types, including split, central, and commercial HVAC systems.

items.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
items.answer: Yes, our team is available 24/7 for urgent breakdowns with rapid diagnostics and immediate intervention when possible.

items.question: Can HVAC systems reduce energy consumption?
items.answer: Modern inverter systems can reduce energy usage by up to 40% when sized correctly and maintained consistently.

items.question: Do you work with residential and commercial clients?
items.answer: Yes, we serve homes, offices, retail spaces, restaurants, and multi-zone commercial buildings across Tangier and nearby areas.

items.question: How long does a typical installation take?
items.answer: Most standard residential installations are completed in one day, while larger commercial projects are scheduled in phases with clear timelines.
